Roof Repairs & Replacements

Don't put up with cracked tiles, rusty metal or a leaky roof. Our roof repair and replacement services can get you ready for the worst of Brisbane's weather.

Gutter Repairs & Replacements

Damaged gutters can spell disaster for your property. To make sure that doesn’t happen, we offer a full range of gutter repair and replacement services.

Roof restoration is a cost-effective way to repair general wear and tear, protect your home and return tile and terracotta roofing to its former glory.

Gutter and Roof Repairs has more than 20 years of experience in the roofing industry. Our fully qualified roofers specialise in every aspect of roofs and guttering, and we’re equipped to handle all metal, tile, concrete and Colorbond® roofing projects.

See What Our Customers Have to Say!

Jason, Dave and the team communicated so well with us every step of the way. We understand how difficult an old roof is to restore. We couldn’t be happier with the process and are amazed at the result. Thanks to Gutter and Roof Repairs, our beloved home has a new lease on life.

Lynda Owen

Extremely happy with this company. I have been trying for the better part of two years to find someone to fix our roof. Most companies either ignored my request or came out and quoted a full roof restoration (up to 14 grand). This company came out, asked what was wrong and what I wanted and delivered exactly that. Will gladly use again.

Jenny Martin

These guys are very professional both via communication leading up to each appointment, and the crew on the ground doing the work. I highly recommend this business, they don’t even leave any rubbish behind! Very respectful of your property and friendly and professional at all times! A very trustworthy business and group of people.

Steph Simpson

Ready to Find Out More?

Our qualified roofers are experienced with repairing and replacing all types of gutters and roofing. Fill out the form to book a quote, or contact us using the Request a Quote form.

About

Gutter and Roof Repairs is one of Brisbane's most experienced gutter and roofing specialists, and we're equipped to handle any repair or replacement work you need. We're one of Brisbane's most experienced roofers and can handle jobs both big and small - from small gutter repairs to roof restorations and roof replacements.

About Gutter and Roof Repairs

The team at Gutter and Roof Repairs are Brisbane’s roofing experts. As a family business based in Morningside and Camp Hill, we service homes and businesses throughout Brisbane and Ipswich, offering services that are backed by more than 20 years’ experience. 

Gutter and Roof Repairs was built on a commitment to quality products and outstanding workmanship. We wanted to build our brand into a one-stop provider for all gutter and roofing services, and we are extremely proud of the progress we have made. These days, our team handles all aspects of gutter and roof replacement, repairs, cleaning, restoration and much more.

Each of our services is performed by fully qualified roofers that have experience working with metal, Colorbond®, tile, terracotta, asbestos and concrete roofing.

We are proud to employ local Qualified tradespeople and Apprentices. 

As a member of Master Builders Queensland, we always uphold the highest standards on our worksites. That means you can rest assured our services are designed to protect your home and family from the worst of Brisbane’s weather.

Gutter and Roof Repairs is one of Brisbane's most experienced gutter and roofing specialists, and we're equipped to handle any repair or replacement work you need. We're one of Brisbane's most experienced roofers and can handle jobs both big and small - from small gutter repairs to roof restorations and roof replacements.

### About Gutter and Roof Repairs

The team at Gutter and Roof Repairs are Brisbane’s roofing experts. As a family business based in Morningside and Camp Hill, we service homes and businesses throughout Brisbane and Ipswich, offering services that are backed by more than 20 years’ experience.

Gutter and Roof Repairs was built on a commitment to quality products and outstanding workmanship. We wanted to build our brand into a one-stop provider for all gutter and roofing services, and we are extremely proud of the progress we have made. These days, our team handles all aspects of gutter and roof replacement, repairs, cleaning, restoration and much more.

Each of our services is performed by fully qualified roofers that have experience working with metal, Colorbond®, tile, terracotta, asbestos and concrete roofing.

We are proud to employ local Qualified tradespeople and Apprentices.

As a member of Master Builders Queensland, we always uphold the highest standards on our worksites. That means you can rest assured our services are designed to protect your home and family from the worst of Brisbane’s weather.

Roof Repair – Karen And Mark – Woolloongabba Qld

Karen and Mark approached with a serious issue with their roof. Mould in their ceiling had alerted them to the fact that water was leaking through their roof and causing damage to their gyprock ceiling.  They knew they had a leak, but they were unsure to where their terracotta tile roof was leaking and how much it would cost to fix.

As you can see from this image there was the potential for their ceiling to sag and droop.

After a thorough inspection of the terracotta tile roof, we detected the roof leak location and spoke about the options for repair.  Karen and Mark decided that the best solution was to remove and replace 5 barge caps and repoint some ridge caps.  This certainly weather proofed their roof and saved thousands of dollars on possible further internal home damage.  They were very relieved the costs were low and they didn’t require an entire re-roof.

After a thorough inspection of the terracotta tile roof, we detected the roof leak location and spoke about the options for repair.  Karen and Mark decided that the best solution was to remove and replace 5 barge caps and repoint some ridge caps.  This certainly weather proofed their roof and saved thousands of dollars on possible further internal home damage.  They were very relieved the costs were low and they didn’t require an entire re-roof.

Asbestos Removal And Tile – Garry – Camp Hill Qld

Garry enquired with us about his asbestos roof, he was worried about the safety of his family.  We recommend if you have concerns about your old asbestos roof we recommend putting you mind at ease and replacing it with a new metal roof material such as colorbond or a concrete or terracotta tile roofing solution.  Metal and tile roofing solutions have many benefits over asbestos, it is fire resistant, longer lasting and adds value to your home instantly.

[![Roofers replacing tiles on camp hill roof](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/asbestos-removal-from-roof-in-camp-hill.jpg)](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/asbestos-removal-and-tile-garry-camp-hill-qld/ "Asbestos Removal And Tile – Garry – Camp Hill Qld")

Garry enquired with us about his asbestos roof, he was worried about the safety of his family.  We recommend if you have concerns about your old asbestos roof we recommend putting you mind at ease and replacing it with a new metal roof material such as colorbond or a concrete or terracotta tile roofing solution.  Metal and tile roofing solutions have many benefits over asbestos, it is fire resistant, longer lasting and adds value to your home instantly.

Finally A Roofie Who Turns Up On Time – Ingrid – Redcliffe Qld

When we arrived at Ingrid’s home in Redcliffe the first thing she said “Thank goodness, finally a trades person that arrives on time!”  Ingrid had told us of the amount of times trades people said they would meet her on site for a quote and they would turn up late or never turned up at all.  Ingrid said “Jason was very pleasant, with no pushy sales spiel”.  So when Ingrid asked us to inspect her metal roof, she knew from the start she could rely on us.  Now Ingrid has a new colorbond metal roof and she is very to recommend our company for quality job done on time.

# Finally A Roofie Who Turns Up On Time – Ingrid – Redcliffe Qld

[![New roof on Redcliffe house](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/house-in-Redcliffejpg-1.jpg)](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/finally-a-roofie-who-turns-up-on-time-ingrid-redcliffe-qld/ "Finally A Roofie Who Turns Up On Time – Ingrid – Redcliffe Qld")

When we arrived at Ingrid’s home in Redcliffe the first thing she said “Thank goodness, finally a trades person that arrives on time!”  Ingrid had told us of the amount of times trades people said they would meet her on site for a quote and they would turn up late or never turned up at all.  Ingrid said “Jason was very pleasant, with no pushy sales spiel”.  So when Ingrid asked us to inspect her metal roof, she knew from the start she could rely on us.  Now Ingrid has a new colorbond metal roof and she is very to recommend our company for quality job done on time.

How to Deal with Storm Damage to your Roof

Queensland is renowned for its sometimes-violent summer storms, but even if a storm doesn’t produce heavy rain or hail, strong winds can be enough for the need to deal with storm damage to your roof.

How to spot roof damage

  • Inspect your ceilings for leaks or water damage. Water stains appearing on your walls or ceilings is a likely indicator that your roof has been damaged.
  • Look for signs of storm damage from the ground or from a safe, high vantage point (e.g. a neighbour’s deck). Check for missing roof tiles or whether your metal or Colorbond roof has suffered any damage.
  • Assess whether there appears to be gutter or drain damage, or damage to joins where the roof meets the walls.
  • Look for trees or large branches that might have hit your roof. Obviously, you will notice large branches or trees that are lying on your roof. In this instance, it may be important for a licensed builder to check whether structural damage has occurred to your house.
  • If the storm produced hail, a roof check is generally required to identify potential hail damage such as dimples in iron or fractures in tiles.

Temporary Repairs

If your house is unsafe, temporarily evacuate and immediately call a roofing contractor to help with temporary repairs. In emergency situations, you can also call the State Emergency Service (SES) QLD to help you weatherproof your roof and ensure it is safe.

Stay Safe

Avoid going on to your roof to check for damage yourself. Leave this to a professional roof contractor.

What To Tell Your Roofer

There are a number of things you can provide to your roofer when you first contact them about roof damage:

What type of roof do you have?

Is your roof metal (Colorbond), tile or concrete terracotta, or asbestos (sometimes referred to as ‘Super 6’).

What damaged your roof?

Was it heavy rain, tree branches, hail, wind, or possibly some other heavy object?

Is Your Roof Safe?

Do you need the roofer to make temporary repairs, or is the roof safe and weatherproof? If the roof is weatherproof, your roofer can instead provide you with a quote for the work required.

Do you have spare tiles?

If you have a tile or terracotta roof, do you have spare tiles available that the roofer can use for repairs?

Have you contacted your insurer?

It’s wise to contact your insurer asap if you have roof damage, so your roofer is aware that your roof repair will be insurance work.

Gutter and Roof Repairs offers quality storm damage roof repairs in Brisbane and Ipswich, and can also provide you with a comprehensive quote to repair or replace your roof. If your roof has been damaged in a storm or rain event, contact Gutter and Roof Repairs for an expert roof inspection and quote.

# How to Deal with Storm Damage to your Roof

[![Storm damaged tile roof with tarpaulin.](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/wp-content/uploads/2018/09/Roof-Repairs_Tarponroof-scaled.webp)](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/how-to-deal-with-storm-damage-to-your-roof/ "How to Deal with Storm Damage to your Roof")

Queensland is renowned for its sometimes-violent summer storms, but even if a storm doesn’t produce heavy rain or hail, strong winds can be enough for the need to deal with storm damage to your roof.

## **How to spot roof damage**

- Inspect your ceilings for leaks or water damage. Water stains appearing on your walls or ceilings is a likely indicator that your roof has been damaged.
- Look for signs of storm damage from the ground or from a safe, high vantage point (e.g. a neighbour’s deck). Check for missing roof tiles or whether your metal or Colorbond roof has suffered any damage.
- Assess whether there appears to be gutter or drain damage, or damage to joins where the roof meets the walls.
- Look for trees or large branches that might have hit your roof. Obviously, you will notice large branches or trees that are lying on your roof. In this instance, it may be important for a licensed builder to check whether structural damage has occurred to your house.
- If the storm produced hail, a roof check is generally required to identify potential hail damage such as dimples in iron or fractures in tiles.

## **Temporary Repairs**

If your house is unsafe, temporarily evacuate and immediately call a roofing contractor to help with temporary repairs. In emergency situations, you can also call the [State Emergency Service (SES) QLD](https://www.ses.qld.gov.au/Pages/default.aspx) to help you weatherproof your roof and ensure it is safe.

## **Stay Safe**

Avoid going on to your roof to check for damage yourself. Leave this to a professional roof contractor.

## **What To Tell Your Roofer**

There are a number of things you can provide to your roofer when you first contact them about roof damage:

### **What type of roof do you have?**

Is your roof metal (Colorbond), tile or concrete terracotta, or asbestos (sometimes referred to as ‘Super 6’).

### **What damaged your roof?**

Was it heavy rain, tree branches, hail, wind, or possibly some other heavy object?

### **Is Your Roof Safe?**

Do you need the roofer to make temporary repairs, or is the roof safe and weatherproof? If the roof is weatherproof, your roofer can instead provide you with a quote for the work required.

### **Do you have spare tiles?**

If you have a tile or terracotta roof, do you have spare tiles available that the roofer can use for repairs?

### **Have you contacted your insurer?**

It’s wise to contact your insurer asap if you have roof damage, so your roofer is aware that your roof repair will be insurance work.

Gutter and Roof Repairs offers quality storm damage roof repairs in Brisbane and Ipswich, and can also provide you with a comprehensive quote to repair or replace your roof. If your roof has been damaged in a storm or rain event, [contact Gutter and Roof Repairs](https://gutterandroofrepairs.com.au/contact-us/) for an expert roof inspection and quote.
